criteria.title: Operational graph classification
criteria.successSummary: Production graph is classified as Operational.
criteria.failureSummary: Production graph is not confirmed Operational.

criteria.title: No blocked ExampleGraph contamination
criteria.successSummary: No blocked ExampleGraph contamination remains in operational release gates.
criteria.failureSummary: Operational graph is still contaminated by example graph data.

criteria.title: Unity Bridge health Passed
criteria.successSummary: Unity Bridge health is passed in doctor and operational evidence.
criteria.failureSummary: Unity Bridge health is not passed in both doctor and operational evidence.

criteria.title: Unity compile check Passed
criteria.successSummary: Unity compile status is passed in doctor and operational evidence.
criteria.failureSummary: Unity compile status is not passed in both doctor and operational evidence.

criteria.title: Console error count 0
criteria.successSummary: Operational evidence reports zero Unity console errors.
criteria.failureSummary: Operational evidence does not prove console error count is zero.

criteria.title: Non-sample Operational Passed evidence exists
criteria.successSummary: Latest smoke evidence is non-sample Operational Passed evidence.
criteria.failureSummary: No non-sample Operational Passed evidence is available.

criteria.title: Live harness latest report has Operational Passed scenario
criteria.successSummary: Latest live harness report has a Passed Operational scenario; fixed smoke evidence remains available for the core gate.
criteria.failureSummary: Latest live harness report does not show any Operational scenario as Passed.

criteria.title: No productization core blockers
criteria.successSummary: Productization has no remaining core blocker outside the review gate itself.
criteria.failureSummary: Productization still reports core blockers other than the review gate.

criteria.title: No non-review release blockers
criteria.successSummary: Release readiness has no blocker outside the Production Core review gate.
criteria.failureSummary: Release readiness still has non-review blockers.

resolvedChanges.summary: Production graph is classified as Operational.
No blocked ExampleGraph contamination remains in operational release gates.
Unity Bridge health is passed in doctor and operational evidence.
Unity compile status is passed in doctor and operational evidence.
Operational evidence reports zero Unity console errors.
Latest smoke evidence is non-sample Operational Passed evidence.
Latest live harness report has a Passed Operational scenario; fixed smoke evidence remains available for the core gate.
Productization has no remaining core blocker outside the review gate itself.
Release readiness has no blocker outside the Production Core review gate.

evidenceUsed.summary: Productization status and operational validation summary.
Release gate state before Production Core review reevaluation.
Unity Bridge health and compile health checks.

releaseBlockersBefore.title: Production Core review
releaseBlockersBefore.nextAction: Resolve changes requested in the Production Core readiness review.

nextAction: Regenerate release readiness and productization reports so the approved Production Core review is reflected in release gates.
